methodology.blindness: Aliases were judged only as A/B. No alias key, sonic-dev artifact, protocol file, or identity-revealing file was read.
methodology.coverage: All 60 seeds, both aliases, and exactly positions 1-5 (600 results).
methodology.deciding_evidence: Explicit frozen Music-Map artist similarity or category-A track evidence decides coherence. Direct MusicBrainz artist tags may support an independent model scene/style judgment but are never scored automatically. Propagated NPZ labels are ignored.
methodology.conservative_rule: Without admissible evidence, uncertainty is high and the result is incoherent.
methodology.pass_rule: Pass exactly when positions 1-3 are all coherent, at least 4 of 5 are coherent, and there is zero junk and zero same-artist result.
methodology.junk_rule: Remix/mix, instrumental, karaoke, tribute, slowed/reverb, mashup, duplicate, and model-identifiable cover variants are junk.
